languages.text: "Передай, что сам Вольный Торговец {name} фон Валанциус почтил их своим визитом и гото{mf|в|ва} позволить им вознести молитвы имплантационному трону".

traits.locale_text: "Передай, что сам Вольный Торговец {name} фон Валанциус почтил их своим визитом и гото{mf|в|ва} позволить им вознести молитвы имплантационному трону".

languages.text: "Inform them that the Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself} has graced them with {mf|his|her} presence, and will permit them to raise prayers to the implantation throne."
languages.original_text: "Передай, что сам Вольный Торговец {name} фон Валанциус почтил их своим визитом и гото{mf|в|ва} позволить им вознести молитвы имплантационному трону".

traits.locale_text: "Inform them that the Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself} has graced them with {mf|his|her} presence, and will permit them to raise prayers to the implantation throne."

"Inform them that the Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself} has graced them with {mf|his|her} presence, and will permit them to raise prayers to the implantation throne."

languages.text: "Informiert sie, dass sie {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin} {name} von Valancius mit {mf|seiner|ihrer} Anwesenheit beehrt und ihnen gestattet, Gebete an den Implantationsthron anzustimmen."
languages.original_text: "Inform them that the Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself} has graced them with {mf|his|her} presence, and will permit them to raise prayers to the implantation throne."

traits.locale_text: "Informiert sie, dass sie {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin} {name} von Valancius mit {mf|seiner|ihrer} Anwesenheit beehrt und ihnen gestattet, Gebete an den Implantationsthron anzustimmen."

languages.text: « Informez-les que {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} {name} von Valancius en personne leur fait la grâce de sa présence, et compte leur donner l'occasion d'adresser leurs prières au fauteuil d'implantation. »
languages.original_text: "Inform them that the Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself} has graced them with {mf|his|her} presence, and will permit them to raise prayers to the implantation throne."

traits.locale_text: « Informez-les que {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} {name} von Valancius en personne leur fait la grâce de sa présence, et compte leur donner l'occasion d'adresser leurs prières au fauteuil d'implantation. »

languages.text: “告诉他们，行商浪人{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯已亲临此地，并准许他们为移植王座献上祷告。”
languages.original_text: "Inform them that the Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself} has graced them with {mf|his|her} presence, and will permit them to raise prayers to the implantation throne."

traits.locale_text: “告诉他们，行商浪人{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯已亲临此地，并准许他们为移植王座献上祷告。”

languages.text: «Infórmeles de que {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente {name} von Valancius les ha concedido el honor de su presencia y les permitirá entonar sus plegarias ante el trono de implantación».
languages.original_text: "Inform them that the Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself} has graced them with {mf|his|her} presence, and will permit them to raise prayers to the implantation throne."

traits.locale_text: «Infórmeles de que {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente {name} von Valancius les ha concedido el honor de su presencia y les permitirá entonar sus plegarias ante el trono de implantación».

languages.text: "自由商人である{name} フォン・ヴァランツィウスが訪問を歓迎し、彼のユニークなインプラントチェアに祈りを捧げさせてくれると伝えてくれ"
languages.original_text: "Tell them that Free Trader himself {name} von Valanzius has honoured them with a visit and is willing to let them offer prayers to his unique implant chair."

languages.text: "Onlara, Hür Tacir {name} von Valancius'un varlığıyla onları onurlandırdığını ve implantasyon tahtına dua etmelerine izin vereceğini bildir."
languages.original_text: "Inform them that the Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself} has graced them with {mf|his|her} presence, and will permit them to raise prayers to the implantation throne."

traits.locale_text: "Onlara, Hür Tacir {name} von Valancius'un varlığıyla onları onurlandırdığını ve implantasyon tahtına dua etmelerine izin vereceğini bildir."
